description: Actions never mutate the live simulator state.
Only COC/OH and LB/MLB actions are applied; 9 + 55 = 64 of 238 executable rows.
ES sleep actions are not applied (state flag exists, RF/KPI hookup pending).
HO/MRO HOM/TTT actions are not applied (state placeholders, no temporal HO model).
CIO-only association bias can move UEs below the -105 dBm attach threshold.
Oracle KPI(t+1) is computed only for COC/OH or LB/MLB oracle picks; HO/MRO oracle picks are marked not_comparable.
Multi-step iteration, action application to live state, and KPI(t+1) feedback to next decision are not implemented.
